meta.title: STREAK EAGLE: How the F-15 beat Russia's MiG-25
meta.description:
The original F-15, designed and built by McDonnell Douglas, was purpose-built to stand toe-to-toe with a Soviet monster — a super fighter so fast and powerful, the West feared it had nothing in its stables that could compete...

Yet.
